subject: humanoid figure in wide-brimmed feathered hat and layered coat, holding an ornate mechanical bow instrument, FFXIV Bard job class
description: A humanoid figure stands in a three-quarter pose wearing a wide-brimmed hat adorned with teal feathers and a long flowing dark coat layered over a white skirt. The figure holds an ornate mechanical bow — heavily decorated with curved metal parts and gem accents — extended outward in a performance or firing stance. The lower background transitions into dark teal forest tones, while the upper half is a pale blue-white sky. The overall look is theatrical and elegant.
foreground: humanoid figure in feathered hat and layered coat, holding ornate mechanical bow extended outward
background: dark teal lower half, pale blue upper half
emotion: poised, theatrical, arms extended in performance stance
